entity.summary: Indian centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in April 2018. CoinDCX remained active after a July 2025 breach involving an internal operational account; the company said customer funds were unaffected and reported that withdrawal requests and core platform services were restored or remained operational.
entity.notes: The launch date is refined to 2018-04-07 using CoinDCX's contemporaneous first-party launch article. The 2025 hack, service restriction, and restoration events are already represented in canonical history and are not duplicated here.

expected.summary: Indian centralized cryptocurrency exchange that confirmed a July 2025 security breach involving an internal operational account, with reports placing the loss at about USD 44 million. CoinDCX said customer funds were not affected and later restored normal withdrawal/service operations.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. The July 2025 incident involved an internal operational account according to company statements and reporting, not customer-custody loss. Track hack/security incident and restoration events while keeping status active.

changes.summary: Indian centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in April 2018. CoinDCX remained active after a July 2025 breach involving an internal operational account; the company said customer funds were unaffected and reported that withdrawal requests and core platform services were restored or remained operational.
changes.notes: The launch date is refined to 2018-04-07 using CoinDCX's contemporaneous first-party launch article. The 2025 hack, service restriction, and restoration events are already represented in canonical history and are not duplicated here.

events.title: CoinDCX launched its crypto-to-crypto exchange
events.description: CoinDCX published its launch announcement on April 7, 2018, introducing an Indian crypto-to-crypto exchange using a liquidity-aggregation model.
events.notes: The date follows CoinDCX's contemporaneous first-party launch article and later company timeline.

evidence.title: CoinDCX: India's First Crypto Unicorn
evidence.notes: First-party company timeline lists April 2018 as the CoinDCX launch.
